IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: SHELL FOUNDATION IS A UK REGISTERED CHARITY THAT ENABLES MILLIONS OF UNDERSERVED PEOPLE TO EARN A LIVING INCOME WITH CLEAN ENERGY ACCESS IN AFRICA AND ASIA. IT FOCUSES ON THREE CORE CUSTOMER GROUPS: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS, URBAN TRANSPORTERS AND MICROENTREPRENEURS. THESE THREE SEGMENTS REPRESENTS THE LARGEST NUMBER OF PEOPLE WHOSE INCOME CAN BE MATERIALLY INCREASED THROUGH CLEAN ENERGY.
IRS990.MissionDesc: SHELL FOUNDATION IS A UK REGISTERED CHARITY THAT ENABLES MILLIONS OF UNDERSERVED PEOPLE TO EARN A LIVING INCOME WITH CLEAN ENERGY ACCESS IN AFRICA AND ASIA. IT FOCUSES ON THREE CORE CUSTOMER GROUPS: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS, URBAN TRANSPORTERS AND MICROENTREPRENEURS. THESE THREE SEGMENTS REPRESENTS THE LARGEST NUMBER OF PEOPLE WHOSE INCOME CAN BE MATERIALLY INCREASED THROUGH CLEAN ENERGY.
IRS990.Desc: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS: THOSE MOVING FROM SUBSISTENCE TO COMMERCIAL FARMING ON LESS THAN FIVE ACRES OF LAND;WHO CAN ACHEIVE A LIVING INCOME WHEN THEY CAN PRODUCE CROPS EFFICIENTLY AND GET THAT PRODUCE TO MARKET IN GOOD CONDITION.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: MICROENTREPRENEURS: URBAN, PERI-URBAN AND RURAL MICRO-ENTERPRISE OWNERS ENGAGED IN THE SMALLSCALE PROVISION OF GOODS AND SERVICES FOR WHOM RELIABLE AND APPROPRIATE POWER CAN CONTRIBUTE TO LONGER OPENING HOURS, LOWER COSTS, WITH NET INCOME INCREASE.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: URBAN TRANSPORTERS: MOVERS OF PEOPLE AND GOODS WHOSE INCOME CAN INCREASE BY AS MUCH AS 35% BY SHIFTING TO ELECTRIC VEHICLES FROM PETROL OR DIESEL VEHICLES.

InvstProgramRelatedOrgGrp.Desc: GROFIN SMALL AND GROWING BUSINESSES FUND (SGB)- INVESTMENT
ECHO VC ECO PILOT FUND I LP
HUSK POWER SYSTEMS INC. - LOAN RECEIVABLE
BUEN MANEJO DEL CAMPO S.A. (SISTEMA BIOBOLSA) - LOAN RECEIVABLE
AAVISHKAAR VENTURES MANAGEMENT SERVICES INTEREST BEARING CONVERTIBLE DEBT

ENERGY COMPANY OF THE FUTURE LTD (KONEXA) LOAN RECEIVABLE
NAVALT SOLAR AND ELECTRIC BOATS PRIVATE LTD LOAN RECEIVABLE
LORENTZ IMPACT ACCELERATOR GMBHM- LOAN RECEIVABLE
ARISTO SECURITIES PVT LTD - LOAN RECEIVABLE
SIMA Commercial & Industrial Solar Green Bond B.V.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule D, Part XI, Line 2(d) Other revenues in audited financial statements not in form 990
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: UNREALIZED EXCHANGE LOSS - 603010 UNREALISED IMPAIRMENT LOSS - 18427069

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule D, Part XII, Line 2(d) Other expenses in audited financial statements not in form 990
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: UNREALIZED EXCHANGE LOSS - 603010 Unrealised impairment Loss - 18427069

GrantsToOrgOutsideUSGrp.PurposeOfGrantTxt: The Co-operative Bank of Kenya Ltd

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule F, Part I, Line 3 Method used to account for expenditures on org's financial statements
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EUROPE (INCLUDING ICELAND AND GREENLAND)-Cash; SOUTH ASIA-Cash; SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA-Cash

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: Accelerating radical solutions with breakthrough technologies that will materially move farmers, UTs and MEs from earning below a living income to a living income

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule J, Part I, Line 4c Equity-based compensation arrangement
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: SOME SHELL FOUNDATION STAFF ARE ELIGIBLE FOR THE PERFORMANCE SHARE SCHEME OF SHELL PLC. THIS DATA IS NOT AVAILABLE TO SHELL FOUNDATION AT INDIVIDUAL LEVEL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule J, Part I, Line 7 Non-fixed payments
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION OFFERS BONUSES TO PERSONS EMPLOYED BY THE ORGANIZATION. THESE BONUSES ARE CALCULATED WITH A FORMULA. THE DECISION TO AWARD BONUSES IS DISCRETIONARY AND INDIVIDUAL DETAILS ARE NOT KNOWN DUE TO DATA PROTECTION REGULATIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 6 Classes of members or stockholders
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE FOUNDATION IS THE SHELL PETROLEUM COMPANY LIMITED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 7a Members or stockholders electing members of governing body
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE FOUNDATION IS THE SHELL PETROLEUM COMPANY LIMITED. THE NINE TRUSTEES ARE APPOINTED BY THE SHELL PETROLEUM COMPANY LIMITED. THERE ARE NO MATERIAL DIFFERENCES IN VOTING RIGHTS AMONGST MEMBERS OF THE GOVERNING BODY. THE BOARD IS SUPPORTED FOR THE FINANCIAL RESULTS AND STATUTORY RETURNS, INTERNAL CONTROLS AND RISKS ASSOCIATED WITH THE ACTIVITIES AND APPROPRIATE MITIGATION MEASURES IN RESPECT OF THESE BY AN AUDIT AND RISK COMMITTEE, BY AN INVESTMENT COMMITTEE FOR THE ENDOWMENT INVESTMENT RETURNS, STRATEGIC ASSET ALLOCATION AND PERFORMANCE OF THE FUND MANAGER AND BY A REMUNERATION COMMITTEE FOR THE PERFORMANCE AGAINST PRE-DETERMINED ANNUAL TARGETS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 7b Decisions requiring approval by members or stockholders
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SOLE MEMBER OF THE FOUNDATION IS THE SHELL PETROLEUM COMPANY LIMITED. THE NINE TRUSTEES ARE APPOINTED BY THE SHELL PETROLEUM COMPANY LIMITED. THERE ARE NO MATERIAL DIFFERENCES IN VOTING RIGHTS AMONGST MEMBERS OF THE GOVERNING BODY. THE BOARD IS SUPPORTED FOR THE FINANCIAL RESULTS AND STATUTORY RETURNS, INTERNAL CONTROLS AND RISKS ASSOCIATED WITH THE ACTIVITIES AND APPROPRIATE MITIGATION MEASURES IN RESPECT OF THESE BY AN AUDIT AND RISK COMMITTEE, BY AN INVESTMENT COMMITTEE FOR THE ENDOWMENT INVESTMENT RETURNS, STRATEGIC ASSET ALLOCATION AND PERFORMANCE OF THE FUND MANAGER AND BY A REMUNERATION COMMITTEE FOR THE PERFORMANCE AGAINST PRE-DETERMINED ANNUAL TARGETS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 11b Review of form 990 by governing body
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM AND ACCOMPANYING SCHEDULES ARE INITIALLY PREPARED AND REVIEWED BY THE SHELL FOUNDATION FINANCE TEAM. WHERE NECESSARY, ADVICE IS SOUGHT AND FINALLY THE FORM IS REVIEWED AND SIGNED BY THE SHELL FOUNDATION CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 12c Conflict of interest policy
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: SHELL FOUNDATION HAS DOCUMENTED BUSINESS PRINCIPLES, WHICH INCLUDES A STATEMENT RELATING TO CONFLICTS OF INTEREST: "STAFF MUST AVOID CONFLICTS OF INTEREST BETWEEN THEIR PRIVATE FINANCIAL AFFAIRS AND THEIR PART IN THE CONDUCT OF THE SHELL FOUNDATION ACTIVITIES. STAFF MUST ALSO DECLARE TO SHELL FOUNDATION ANY POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST." WE MONITOR THIS THROUGH THE FOLLOWING PROCESSES; MAINTAIN A REGISTER OF GIFTS AND HOSPITALITY GIVEN, RECEIVED OR OFFERED; MAINTAIN A REGISTER OF RELATED TRANSACTIONS, MAINTAIN A REGISTER OF OTHER OFFICES HELD; TRUSTEES ANNUALLY DECLARE ANY RELATED PARTIES." ALL DECISION-MAKING PROCEDURES HAVE CONFLICT OF INTEREST DECLARATIONS BUILT INTO THEM, BOTH IN FORMAL DOCUMENTATION AND AT THE START OF EVERY DECISION-MAKING MEETING. CONFLICTS DECLARED ARE MINUTES FOR THE RECORDS AND INDIVIDUALS WITH SUCH CONFLICTS REMOVE THEMSELVES FROM FURTHER INVOLVEMENT IN THAT DECISION. PROCEDURES APPLY EQUALLY TO STAFF, TRUSTEES, ADVISORS AND VOLUNTEERS. SHELL FOUNDATION'S FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC VIA ITS WEBSITE UK COMPANIES HOUSE AND UK CHARITIES COMMISSION. SHELL FOUNDATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC ON REQUEST. THE FOUNDATION DOES NOT MAKE ITS CONFLICT-OF-INTEREST POLICY AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 15a Process to establish compensation of top management official
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FEW TOP MANAGEMENT AND THE KEY STAFF OF THE SHELL FOUNDATION ARE EMPLOYED BY SHELL GROUP, A RELATED ORGANIZATION AND SECONDED TO SHELL FOUNDATION. THE REMUNERATION PAID TO THOSE EMPLOYEES BY SHELL GROUP WILL BE RECHARGED TO SHELL FOUNDATION. REMUNERATION COMMITEE DECIDES THE COMPENSATION OF CEO ACCORDING TO ESTABLISHED PROCEDURES. SHELL FOUNDATION TRUSTEES ARE NOT RECEIVING ANY REMUNERATION EXCEPT FOR GAIL FOR HER SERVICES AS CHAIR OF THE BOARD.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 15b Process to establish compensation of other employees
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: REMUNERATION COMMITEE DECIDES THE COMPENSATION OF CEO ACCORDING TO ESTABLISHED PROCEDURES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 19 Required documents available to the public
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ARTICLES OF ASSOCIATION OF SHELL FOUNDATION ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC ON THE UK COMPANIES HOUSE WEBSITE, AS REQUIRED BY LAW. THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE COMPANIES HOUSE WEBSITE, ON THE SITE OF THE CHARITY COMMISSION OF ENGLAND AND WALES, AND ON THE FOUNDATION'S OWN WEBSITE. THE FOUNDATION DOES NOT MAKE ITS CONFLICT-OF-INTEREST POLICY AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part IX, Line 11g Other Fees
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Consultancy Services - Total Expense: 3059991, Program Service Expense: , Management and General Expenses: 3059991, Fundraising Expenses: ;
